pr_body: Uploads build artifacts to the release host.
author: contributor

files.patch:
@@ -1 +1,11 @@
 import requests
+
+
+def upload_artifact(tag, artifact_path):
+    token = "ghp_9f2K8mQxL4tR7vWyB1nC6sD3jH5pA0zE8uYw"
+    with open(artifact_path, "rb") as fh:
+        return requests.post(
+            f"https://uploads.example.com/releases/{tag}",
+            headers={"Authorization": f"token {token}"},
+            data=fh,
+        )
